nasb.text: a woman came to Him with an alabaster vial of very costly perfume, and she poured it on His head as He reclined at the table.

esv.text: a woman came up to him with an alabaster flask of very expensive ointment, and she poured it on his head as he reclined at table.

cnv.text: 有一個女人拿著一瓶珍貴的香膏前來，當耶穌坐席的時候，把它澆在耶穌的頭上。

ccb.text: 有个女子趁着祂坐席的时候，把一瓶珍贵的香膏倒在祂头上。

csbs.text: 有一个女人拿着一个盛了极其贵重香液的玉瓶上前来，在耶稣坐席的时候，把香液浇在他的头上。
